Docs.summary: Info about the current state of the virtual machine.

.property instance string ScaleSetVmResourceId
Public ReadOnly Property ScaleSetVmResourceId As String
member this.ScaleSetVmResourceId : string

Docs.summary: The resource ID of the Compute Node's current Virtual Machine Scale Set VM. Only defined if the Batch Account was created with its poolAllocationMode property set to 'UserSubscription'.
